about.name: Daniel
about.bio: I go by a few aliases, and "jooncco" is the one I use when I build things. I started out as a back-end engineer at LG CNS and grew into a full-stack engineer any team would love to work with. I've led business-critical projects of every size to the finish line — scroll down for the mission log.

now.title: Now
now.intro: A snapshot of what I'm focused on right now — inspired by the /now movement.

ai-agents.label: Building AI agents
ai-agents.detail: Designing and shipping production RAG and agentic workflows on AWS Bedrock and Claude.

algo-trading.label: Algorithmic trading
algo-trading.detail: Researching systematic crypto strategies — price models, signals, and disciplined backtesting.

writing.label: Writing on the blog
writing.detail: Documenting engineering deep-dives and competitive-programming notes as I go.

learning.label: Always learning
learning.detail: Sharpening systems design and keeping up with the fast-moving AI tooling landscape.

blog.title: From the blog
blog.empty: No posts yet — check back soon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We're just a few bytes away. Drop me a message and I'll get back to you ASAP.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to say?

validation.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
validation.messageTooShort: Your message is a little too short.

alerts.invalidBody: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
alerts.sentBody: Thanks — I'll get back to you ASAP ;)
alerts.errorBody: Something went wrong. A very long message can trip this up — if so, please email me directly.
alerts.notConfiguredBody: Email isn't configured on this deployment. Please reach out via the social links instead.
